comment: LaunchGrid human b-roll shot list — fed to generate_wan_colab.ipynb. Portrait 480x832 (upscale later). Concepts marked ★ in VIDEO_ADS_50.md (single-scene, no lip-sync, no on-screen text — ideal for open video models). Keep prompts atmosphere-driven; UI/text gets composited crisply in Remotion, never generated.
negative: text, watermark, logo, subtitles, distorted hands, extra fingers, deformed face, low quality, jpeg artifacts, cartoon, anime

clips.prompt: Cinematic close-up, dark Indian bedroom at night, a smartphone on a wooden bedside table lights up with a soft warm glow, a young woman's face is gently illuminated as she wakes and smiles faintly, shallow depth of field, warm orange screen light against cool blue moonlight, photorealistic, film grain

Cinematic shot, warm golden hour light in an Indian home kitchen, flour dust floating in the air, a middle-aged woman's hands kneading dough, glass pickle jars and brass masala tins on a shelf behind, shallow depth of field, photorealistic, soft film grain

Cinematic shot, cramped college hostel room at night lit by string fairy lights, a young Indian man packs a small parcel with brown paper at a desk crowded with textbooks, warm intimate lighting, handheld camera feel, photorealistic

Cinematic shot inside a crowded Mumbai local train, a young Indian woman holds the overhead rail with one hand and looks at her phone in the other hand with a subtle smile, motion blur of the city passing the window, natural daylight, documentary style, photorealistic

Cinematic shot, heavy monsoon rain on an Indian street at dusk, a delivery courier on a motorbike with a glowing delivery bag covered in plastic, neon shop reflections on wet asphalt, dramatic atmosphere, photorealistic, shallow depth of field

Cinematic wide shot, an old Indian shop owner pulls down a metal shutter of a small shop at dusk, warm streetlight glow, long shadows, melancholic but hopeful atmosphere, photorealistic, anamorphic lens look

Cinematic shot, Indian family dinner table at night, warm tungsten light, a young man glances at his phone under the table and makes a quiet small fist pump, candid documentary feel, shallow depth of field, photorealistic

Cinematic slow push-in portrait, a confident young Indian woman entrepreneur in a small sunlit studio surrounded by handmade jewelry on a wooden table, she looks toward the camera and smiles softly, golden hour window light, photorealistic, 85mm lens, film grain
